name: bun-runtime
tagline: Reference guide for using Bun as a JS/TS runtime, package manager, bundler, and test runner, including Node migration and Vercel setup.
verdict: Clean, accurate, low-risk reference skill with concrete commands and worked examples throughout, and sound default choices for tool forks. Minor gaps: the description states topic rather than an explicit trigger phrase, and there is no versioning signal.

highlights.summary: Description states what the skill covers (runtime/pkg-manager/bundler/tests) but never phrases an explicit 'use when' trigger.
No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes anywhere in the skill.
